/* ── WAVE DIVIDER ── */ .wave { overflow: hidden; height: 60px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .wave svg { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; } /* ── SHARED SECTION ── */ section { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .wrap { max-width: 1080px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 100px 60px; } .s-label { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .36em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--leaf-mid); margin-bottom: 16px; display: block; } .s-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(34px,4.8vw,56px); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.05; color: var(--charcoal); margin-bottom: 50px; } .s-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--leaf); } /* ── ABOUT ── */ #about { background: var(--warm-white); } .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.35fr; gap: 72px; align-items: start; } .portrait-wrap { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 3/4; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 2px; background: #6a9a50; } .portrait-wrap img.portrait-photo { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top; display: block; } .portrait-wrap .pfallback { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: .15em; color: var(--moss-dark); opacity: .5; text-align: center; padding: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#c2d8a8,#7aaa60); } /* Ivy accent photo overlaid on portrait corner */ .portrait-wrap .corner-ivy { position: absolute; bottom: 0; right: 0; width: 45%; height: 45%; object-fit: cover; mix-blend-mode: multiply; opacity: .78; filter: saturate(1.3); mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 90% at 100% 100%, black 35%, transparent 75%); -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 90% at 100% 100%, black 35%, transparent 75%); pointer-events: none; z-index: 2; } .portrait-wrap::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 55%, rgba(26,46,18,.28) 100%); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; } .about-bio { font-size: 16px; color: #4a4030; line-height: 1.88; margin-bottom: 18px; } .about-bio a { color: var(--rose); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(196,112,90,.3); } .tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 30px; } .tag { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--leaf); border: 1px solid rgba(90,140,71,.35); padding: 6px 14px; background: rgba(90,140,71,.06); } /* ── GALLERY ── */ #gallery { background: var(--parchment); } .tabs { display: flex; margin-bottom: 48px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(90,140,71,.2); } .tab-btn { font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--moss-dark); background: none; border: none; padding: 13px 24px; cursor: pointer; opacity: .38; transition: all .3s; position: relative; outline: none; } .tab-btn::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -1px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: var(--leaf-mid); transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform .3s; } .tab-btn.active { opacity: 1; } .tab-btn.active::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .tab-btn:hover { opacity: .7; } .tab-panel { display: none; } .tab-panel.active { display: block; } .ggrid { display: grid; gap: 4px; } .ggrid.g3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); } .ggrid.g2 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); } .gi { aspect-ratio: 1; position: relative; overflow: hidden; cursor: none; background: var(--leaf-mid); } .ggrid.g2 .gi { aspect-ratio: 4/3; } .gi img { width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .6s var(--ease); } .gi:hover img { transform: scale(1.07); } .gi-ov { position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:2;background:rgba(22,42,14,.8);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .4s;padding:20px;text-align:center; } .gi:hover .gi-ov { opacity:1; } .gi-title { font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:20px;font-style:italic;color:var(--sunlight-soft);margin-bottom:6px; } .gi-sub { font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--leaf-pale); } .g-note { margin-top:22px;font-size:13px;color:#8a8070;text-align:center;letter-spacing:.05em; } .g-note code { background:rgba(0,0,0,.06);padding:2px 5px;border-radius:3px;font-size:12px; } /* ── VOICE ── */ .vgrid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 18px; } .vcard { background: rgba(255,255,255,.72); border: 1px solid rgba(90,140,71,.14); padding: 28px; transition: all .4s var(--ease); position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 2px; } .vcard::before { content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--leaf-mid);transform:scaleY(0);transition:transform .4s;transform-origin:bottom; } .vcard:hover::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .vcard:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 38px rgba(50,90,20,.11); } .vc-label { font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--leaf-mid);margin-bottom:8px;display:block; } .vc-title { font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:22px;font-style:italic;color:var(--charcoal);margin-bottom:5px; } .vc-desc { font-size:13px;color:#6a6050;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:18px; } .aplayer { display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;background:rgba(90,140,71,.08);padding:10px 14px;border-radius:2px; } .pbtn { width:30px;height:30px;border:1px solid rgba(90,140,71,.4);background:none;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .3s;outline:none;border-radius:50%; } .pbtn:hover { background:rgba(90,140,71,.15);border-color:var(--leaf); } .pbtn svg { width:9px;fill:var(--leaf); } .abar { flex:1;height:2px;background:rgba(90,140,71,.15); } .abar-fill { height:100%;background:var(--leaf-mid);width:0%;transition:width .1s; } .atime { font-size:11px;color:#8a8070;min-width:34px; } /* ── CONTACT ── */ #contact { background: var(--forest-deep); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .contact-bg-img { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center 60%; opacity: .16; z-index: 0; filter: saturate(0.6); } .contact-inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; } #contact .s-title { color: var(--parchment); } #contact .s-label { color: var(--leaf-pale); } .cgrid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 72px; align-items: start; } .c-intro { font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:clamp(26px,3.8vw,40px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.18;color:var(--cream);margin-bottom:18px; } .c-intro em { font-style:italic;color:var(--sunlight-soft); } .c-sub { font-size:15px;color:rgba(208,232,192,.62);line-height:1.72;margin-bottom:34px; } .c-sub a { color:var(--rose-soft);text-decoration:none; } .clinks { display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px; } .clink { display:flex;align-items:center;gap:15px;text-decoration:none;color:rgba(208,232,192,.72);font-size:13px;padding:13px 17px;border:1px solid rgba(90,180,50,.12);transition:all .35s var(--ease);border-radius:2px; } .clink:hover { background:rgba(90,180,50,.08);border-color:rgba(90,180,50,.28);color:var(--cream); } .clink-icon { width:29px;height:29px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1px solid rgba(196,112,90,.28);flex-shrink:0;border-radius:50%; } .clink-icon svg { width:13px;fill:var(--rose-soft); } .fg { margin-bottom:16px; } .fl { display:block;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--leaf-pale);opacity:.65;margin-bottom:6px; } .fi,.ft { width:100%;background:rgba(180,225,140,.05);border:1px solid rgba(90,180,50,.18);color:var(--cream);font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:14px;padding:12px 14px;outline:none;transition:border-color .3s;resize:none;border-radius:2px; } .fi:focus,.ft:focus { border-color:rgba(90,180,50,.48); } .fi::placeholder,.ft::placeholder { color:rgba(208,232,192,.22); } .ft { height:106px; } .fsub { width:100%;background:rgba(90,180,50,.13);border:1px solid rgba(90,180,50,.38);color:var(--leaf-pale);font-family:var(--font-body);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .35s var(--ease);outline:none;border-radius:2px; } .fsub:hover { background:rgba(90,180,50,.26);border-color:var(--leaf-pale);color:var(--cream); } /* ── FOOTER ── */ footer { background:var(--ink);padding:38px 140px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid rgba(90,180,50,.07); } .fl-left { font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:13px;font-style:italic;color:rgba(205,230,185,.32); } .fl-right { font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(205,230,185,.22); } .fl-studio { font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--rose-soft);opacity:.58;text-decoration:none;transition:opacity .3s; } .fl-studio:hover { opacity:1; } /* ── REVEAL ── */ .rev { opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px);transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s ease; } .rev.in { opacity:1;transform:translateY(0); } /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */ @media(max-width:980px){ nav,footer{ padding-left:24px;padding-right:24px; } .wrap{ padding:80px 24px; } .nav-links{ display:none; } .vine{ width:55px; } .about-grid,.cgrid{ grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px; } .vgrid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } .ggrid.g3{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); } footer{ flex-direction:column;gap:12px;text-align:center; } } @media(max-width:560px){ .vine{ display:none; } nav,footer{ padding:16px 18px; } .wrap{ padding:60px 18px; } }
Erica Potts

MarrowVeil Studios
Illustrator · Designer · Voice Artist

Erica
Potts

Where the wild things are drawn.

View Work
Scroll
About

Art rooted in
living things

Erica Potts is a multidisciplinary creative artist specializing in illustration, character design, and voice performance. Her work draws deeply from the natural world — mossy forest floors, twisted roots, the quiet wonder of something half-seen at the edge of the treeline.

With a background spanning nature illustration, fantasy character design, and horror-inflected graphic work, Erica brings an organic intuition to every project. She is a core member of MarrowVeil Studios, contributing visual identity and voice work to the HourGlass universe.

Nature Illustration Fantasy Design Horror Art Character Design Voice Acting Graphic Design
